name: Crockpot Beef and Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into serving size pieces.
2. If desired, brown the meat in a little hot oil before adding to the crockpot.
3. Place the thinly sliced pepper rings in the bottom of the crockpot, reserving a few to place on top of the meat if desired (vegetables cook better when placed at the bottom of the pot).
4. Arrange the meat on the peppers, taking care not to stack one piece directly on top of another.
5. Mix all other ingredients and pour over the meat and peppers.
6. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours or on high for about 4 hours.
7. Serve with mashed potatoes and simply seasoned vegetables.
